title: Matrices, Job Dependencies, Outputs, and Immutable Artifacts · Guided Workflow Studio
summary: A delivery pairing session predicts each automation transition before producing the first working matrix and artifact handoff contract for matrices, job dependencies, outputs, and immutable artifacts. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of matrix and artifact handoff contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design include and exclude rules, experimental axes, fail-fast, max-parallel, names, and support-policy coverage without combinatorial waste.
Trace needs dependencies, job results, always and failure conditions, skipped ancestors, and cleanup behavior through a directed graph.
Write multiline-safe step outputs, promote validated job outputs, handle size and secret redaction limits, and parse downstream types explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Workshop Ci Matrix Axis Coverage
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop matrix excludes one supported platform, overwrites artifact names, passes string outputs as booleans, and downloads an executable from another run. Prove graph results, types, producer identity, digest, layout, and trust.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Workshop Ci Matrix Axis Coverage.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design include and exclude rules, experimental axes, fail-fast, max-parallel, names, and support-policy coverage without combinatorial waste. For Commit to the mission model · Workshop Ci Matrix Axis Coverage, keep Ci Matrix Axis Coverage connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity-1ihq4c". Tailor its handoff-contract.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity into observable performance evidence. For Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity, keep Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity-1ihq4c
  - competency: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity
    artifact: handoff-contract.yaml
    decision: artifact download permission integrity
    environment: reusable workflow called by three repositories at different revisions
    fault-injection: cancel an older run while its external mutation is in progress
    retained-proof: runner image runtime version authority network and teardown record
    case-key: 1ihq4c
    change: |
      matrix: node-22-24-by-ubuntu-macos-windows
      experimental: continue-only-declared-axis
      max-parallel: bounded
      needs: explicit-dag
      outputs: validated-json
      artifact-name: build-linux-x64-run8842
      artifact-digest: sha256-verified
      retention-days: 7
      hidden-files: excluded
    verify: enumerate matrix cases trace job results parse outputs and verify artifact ID digest layout retention and producer
    failure: Reject silent coverage exclusions, output type assumptions, artifact name reuse, hidden secret upload, or download as execution trust.
    repair: Prove matrix coverage, validate outputs, use unique immutable artifacts, verify digests and permissions, and bound retention.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model · Workshop Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity
steps.instruction:
Write the workshop evidence note for Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A workshop matrix excludes one supported platform, overwrites artifact names, passes string outputs as booleans, and downloads an executable from another run. Prove graph results, types, producer identity, digest, layout, and trust. Competency probe: Download by expected run and artifact identity, verify digest and file layout, preserve permissions deliberately, and treat cross-run contents as untrusted.
